name: Orianna
playstyleSummary: Orianna is a mid-lane mage who fights through a ball that she commands to different locations - her power comes from herself and the ball being in the right spot to layer damage, shields, and slows. She feels like a strategic puzzle: figuring out where to put the ball matters more than raw mechanical execution.
strengths: Strong poke and wave clear with Command: Attack
Can shield and protect an ally with Command: Protect
Ultimate can pull the whole enemy team together for a teamfight-winning combo
Flexible - can play aggressive or defensive depending on where she sends the ball
weaknesses: Very squishy with no personal escape or mobility
All her power is tied to the ball's location, so losing track of it hurts
Ultimate has a delay before it triggers, giving enemies a chance to spread out
No way to fight effectively up close

abilities.name: Clockwork Windup
abilities.howToUseIt: Attacking the same enemy repeatedly ramps up bonus magic damage, so focus one target with your attacks in a fight instead of spreading them around.

abilities.name: Command: Attack
abilities.howToUseIt: Send this to poke enemies in lane or clear minion waves. The ball stays where it lands, so think about where you want it before casting your other spells.

abilities.name: Command: Dissonance
abilities.howToUseIt: This damages and slows enemies near the ball while speeding up allies near it - use it defensively to slow a chaser, or offensively before an all-in.

abilities.name: Command: Protect
abilities.howToUseIt: Send the ball to shield yourself or an ally and deal damage to enemies along the way - casting it on yourself is a fast way to pull the ball back to your position.

abilities.name: Command: Shockwave
abilities.howToUseIt: Save this for when several enemies are grouped near the ball - after a short delay it pulls them all toward the ball, so line it up with your team's follow-up damage or crowd control.

earlyGamePlan: Poke your lane opponent with Command: Attack whenever they step up to farm, and use Command: Protect on yourself if you need the ball back quickly or a shield against incoming damage. Stay behind your minions since you have no escape spell, and look for moments to land Command: Shockwave for an early kill once you hit level 6.
quickTips: Keep track of where your ball is - your other three spells all depend on it
Cast Command: Protect on yourself to quickly retrieve the ball
Focus your attacks on one enemy to build up your passive's bonus damage
Land Command: Dissonance on chasers to slow them and secure your escape
Look for Command: Shockwave when 2 or more enemies are clustered near your ball
Stay near allies before a fight so you can shield the right person with Command: Protect
whatToExpect: Orianna deals most of her damage and control through her ball, so watch where it is - if it's not near you, she's much less threatening for a moment. Be careful grouping up with your team once she's level 6, since her ultimate can pull your whole group together for the rest of her team to follow up on; spreading out reduces how many of you get caught.

glossary.definition: Dealing small amounts of damage from range before a real fight starts.
The group of minions that march down a lane.
Committing fully to a fight rather than trading and backing off.
Effects like stuns, slows, and roots that limit what an enemy can do.
A champion with low health or defenses who dies quickly.
Killing minions or monsters for gold and experience.
